panels.title: Run ${active_run}
panels.description: Active run header. Title = run_uuid; body = free-text description from the runner script's plan event (emit via ``bffi-pipeline plan ... --description '...'``). Falls back to ``—`` when no description was supplied.

panels.title: Started
panels.description: Wall-clock time of the run's earliest start event.

panels.title: ETA / Completed
panels.description: Top: M9's Phase 2 ETA in seconds (the bench-dominant remaining work — picker dispatch). Reads — until Phase 2 has emitted two cadence-spaced progress events so a rate can be derived. Bottom: most recent stage end timestamp. When the run is complete, ETA reads 0 and the bottom value shows when it finished.

panels.title: M2 marc-to-bf
panels.description: Current state of pipeline stage `m2` for the active run. Green=running, blue=done, grey=idle / not-yet-started. P-12 Phase E.

targets.expr: sum(30 * (count(bffi_stage_ended_timestamp{stage="m2",run_uuid="$active_run"}) or on() vector(0)) + 20 * ((count(bffi_stage_started_timestamp{stage="m2",run_uuid="$active_run"}) unless count(bffi_stage_ended_timestamp{stage="m2",run_uuid="$active_run"})) or on() vector(0)) + 10 * ((bffi_stage_planned{stage="m2",run_uuid="$active_run"} unless on(stage, run_uuid) bffi_stage_started_timestamp{stage="m2",run_uuid="$active_run"}) or on() vector(0))) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: ${m2_total} records
panels.description: M2 marc-to-bf — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: ${m3_total} records
panels.description: M3 bf-to-bffi — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: ${m5_total} embeddings
panels.description: M5 embeddings — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: ${m6_total} pairs
panels.description: M6 judge — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: ${m8_total} works
panels.description: M8 consolidate — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: ${m9_total} entities
panels.description: M9 reconcile: top-line title shows the freshest phase's processed/total fraction; bars show each M9 phase's percent done (phase 1 = entity walk, phase 2 = picker calls). Active run only.

panels.title: ${skosify_total} records
panels.description: Skosify — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: ${load_total} records
panels.description: Load → Fuseki — cumulative entities processed (top) and current throughput in items/min (bottom). Active run only.

panels.title: Skosify + Load
panels.description: Skosify (canonical → SKOS) + Load (→ Fuseki) entities processed. Active run only.

panels.title: M8 + M9
panels.description: M8 (consolidate) entities processed + M9 (reconcile) outcome distribution per tier. Active run only. Bars share scale so the M9 outcomes visually decompose the M8 total.

panels.title: M2 + M3
panels.description: M2 (MARCXML → BIBFRAME) + M3 (BIBFRAME → BFFI) — entities processed at top, per-error-type counts from bibframe/_errors.jsonl and bffi/_validation.jsonl below. Active run only. Mirrors the M8+M9 column's structure.

panels.title: M5 + M6
panels.description: M5 (embeddings) processed + M6 (judge) outcome buckets + M6 watchdog event counts. Mirrors the M8+M9 column's structure. Active run only.

links.title: Zoom to active run window
links.tooltip: Reload the dashboard with from=<active run's earliest start event>, to=now. Click after selecting / waiting for the latest run.
